nodes.label: Admin Logo (PNG)
nodes.summary: The Vue.js framework logo in PNG format used as the public-facing icon for the admin web application.

nodes.label: Admin Logo (SVG)
nodes.summary: The Vue.js framework logo in SVG vector format (green and dark-grey chevron/diamond shape) embedded as an asset in the admin frontend source.

nodes.label: Admin Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin console main dashboard page showing key statistics and navigation overview for the 晨读营 (Morning Reading Camp) management system.

nodes.label: Check-ins Management Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin check-ins management page showing the list of user daily check-in submissions with filtering and status controls.

nodes.label: Insights Management Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin insights (洞见) management page where administrators can review, edit, and publish user-submitted reading insights.

nodes.label: Check-in Records Detail Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot showing the detailed check-in records view with individual user check-in entries, timestamps, and content within a specific period.

nodes.label: Contents Management Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin contents management page for managing daily reading content items (音频、文章等) within course sections.

nodes.label: Database Management Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin database management page providing direct data inspection and maintenance tools for the MongoDB collections.

nodes.label: Sections Management Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin sections management page for organizing course sections (章节) within a period, including ordering and visibility controls.

nodes.label: Audit Log Screenshot
nodes.summary: Annotated screenshot of the admin audit log page displaying a chronological record of administrative actions and system events for accountability tracking.
